ab: tinuatumane su kela?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: tinua daadavaca ku.
en: I came on foot.

ab: ngukay su ki manemane kela?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: ngukayya ku ki base.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: lripangitumane su mua kiwkay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: lri untingi ku ama sateatedre nakuane.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: ka lasu nguakay ki manemane lu mu gaku?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: ka lasu ngukay ki cieyun mua gaku.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: ku kayngu su nguakay ki manemane lu langay ku lacenge?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: nguakay ki utubay.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: lri pangitumane su mua Lanyu?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: lri ngukayya ku ki varukuru mua Lanyu.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: ka lasu nguakay ki manemane mua Lanyu?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: ka lasu nguakay ki ngiapalay mua Lanyu.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: ka lasu nguakay ki manemane mua Takaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: kalasu nguakay ki kawti.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: ka lasu ngukay ki kisia mua Taytungu?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: unu, ka lasu nguakay ki kisia mua taytungu.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: ka lasu nguakay ki kisia mua Taytungu?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ini, ka lasu ngukay ki ngiapalay mua Taytungu.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: kay nguadadeethe yakay ku tisiaba ki base?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: unu, lu aru cucubunga lridreele su ku tisiaba.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: ku adeedethenga ki cieyun yakay taliinu?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: kadrua kikay ku cieyun   kathaane ku takisi ku angukayyane su.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: lungukayyane ki base muagaku lri tarathainu ku zikange?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: lrika mangeale si lrima ki punkange daruru gaku.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: lungukayyane ki kawti tarathainu si daruru Tayciw?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: lrika vaeva ki tuki si daruru Tayciw.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: lu nguhayyane mua Ulay maulay madu?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: ikay kaw vaeva ki tuki.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: lungukay su ki cieyun kela nayyanane lri tarathainu?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: lrika mapusale ki punkange.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: wathingale su ngulrilrikili?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: wathingale su zidinsia?
wathingala ku nguutubay.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: yakay ku uutubay su?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: yakay k uvaeva ku utubay li.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: yakay ku utubay su?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: kadrua ku utubay li.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
